item.title: Head‑On Crash Code Response Double Time
item.description: A head‑on crash demands urgent action. How does the team respond at double speed to clear the scene?

media:content.media:title: Head‑On Crash Code Response Double Time
media:content.media:description: A head‑on crash demands urgent action. How does the team respond at double speed to clear the scene?

item.title: Flipping It
item.description: When a vehicle flips, recovery takes skill and speed. How do you safely turn chaos back upright?

media:content.media:title: Flipping It
media:content.media:description: When a vehicle flips, recovery takes skill and speed. How do you safely turn chaos back upright?

item.title: Chipping Truck Trapped? No Problem!
item.description: A chipping truck gets stuck, but the crew has a plan. What recovery method saves the day?

media:content.media:title: Chipping Truck Trapped? No Problem!
media:content.media:description: A chipping truck gets stuck, but the crew has a plan. What recovery method saves the day?

item.title: Loaded Truck Stuck in the Mud
item.description: A heavy truck sinks deep into the mud. How do you pull free a load that refuses to budge?

media:content.media:title: Loaded Truck Stuck in the Mud
media:content.media:description: A heavy truck sinks deep into the mud. How do you pull free a load that refuses to budge?

item.title: Veteran Employee’s Fun Rollback Job
item.description: Experience counts—watch a veteran employee make a rollback job look easy. What tricks keep the process smooth and efficient?

media:content.media:title: Veteran Employee’s Fun Rollback Job
media:content.media:description: Experience counts—watch a veteran employee make a rollback job look easy. What tricks keep the process smooth and efficient?

item.title: Crews respond to a pickup truck fire on the interstate
item.description: Emergency crews respond under lights and sirens to a pickup truck fire on the interstate — a fast-moving situation that demands a calm, coordinated response. What goes through your mind when you see emergency vehicles on the highway?

media:content.media:title: Crews respond to a pickup truck fire on the interstate
media:content.media:description: Emergency crews respond under lights and sirens to a pickup truck fire on the interstate — a fast-moving situation that demands a calm, coordinated response. What goes through your mind when you see emergency vehicles on the highway?

item.title: Getting a vehicle out of the ditch
item.description: A vehicle ends up off the road and the recovery operation gets underway. Watch the careful, methodical process of getting it safely back on solid ground without causing further damage. Have you ever needed a ditch recovery?

media:content.media:title: Getting a vehicle out of the ditch
media:content.media:description: A vehicle ends up off the road and the recovery operation gets underway. Watch the careful, methodical process of getting it safely back on solid ground without causing further damage. Have you ever needed a ditch recovery?

item.title: A timely reminder to slow down on wet roads
item.description: Rain changes everything on the road — stopping distances, visibility, and vehicle handling all take a hit. A practical and timely reminder of why extra caution matters when the weather turns. How do you adjust your driving in wet conditions?

media:content.media:title: A timely reminder to slow down on wet roads
media:content.media:description: Rain changes everything on the road — stopping distances, visibility, and vehicle handling all take a hit. A practical and timely reminder of why extra caution matters when the weather turns. How do you adjust your driving in wet conditions?

item.title: Recovering From The Tree
item.description: A crash into nature leaves a tough job ahead. How do crews pull a vehicle free from the trees?

media:content.media:title: Recovering From The Tree
media:content.media:description: A crash into nature leaves a tough job ahead. How do crews pull a vehicle free from the trees?

item.title: Securing the Car Before We Go
item.description: Safety comes first in recovery. What steps ensure the car is secure before the journey begins?

media:content.media:title: Securing the Car Before We Go
media:content.media:description: Safety comes first in recovery. What steps ensure the car is secure before the journey begins?
